sources.quote: Adults and children older than 12 years of age may usually take nonprescription ibuprofen every 4 to 6 hours as needed for pain or fever, but should not take more than 6 doses in 24 hours.

factsExtracted.value: Ibuprofen OTC adult maximum daily frequency
Not more than 6 doses in 24 hours
Adults and children older than 12 years of age
